title: Northstar Robotics Full Seed Room

company.name: Northstar Robotics
company.one_line_summary: Northstar builds inspection robots for aging industrial sites.

round.objective: Evaluate whether the inspection wedge can expand into a maintenance platform.

narrative.current_story: Northstar Robotics helps industrial operators inspect high-risk sites without sending technicians into unsafe areas.
must_prove: Paid pilots convert into repeat inspections.
The robot can operate in the target industrial environments.
Inspection data can become the wedge into maintenance workflows.
must_not_overclaim: Do not represent pilots as annual contracts.
Do not imply full maintenance automation is already live.

claims.claim: Three pilot customers have completed paid inspections.
claims.evidence: The seed deck and pilot summary both list three completed paid inspections.

claims.claim: Inspection data can expand into a maintenance workflow platform.
claims.evidence: Founder hypothesis based on customer interviews; source notes are not included.

claims.claim: Hardware gross margin reached 42 percent in the March model.
claims.evidence: The March model has been superseded by the June model.

missing_context: Customer interview notes supporting the maintenance workflow expansion claim
self_hosting_notice: This static bundle includes public-safe materials only. Gated model files are listed in the manifest and require separate access.
